printed.name: Biceps
printed.setup: Start in Circles Up position (page 74), arms straight and back of trunk, parallel to each other (as close as possible). hands holding straps

movement.inhale: Straighten arms, return to start position

cues: Maintain trunk stabilization, avoiding ribs flaring
Keep upper arms and elbows stable
Maintain neutral postion of scapulae (as close as possible)
